failure.message: Should navigate after all lines complete Expected: not null But was: null

Completing dialogue.

test-case.name: LinearFlow_LongChain_HandlesMultipleTransitions

failure.message: Should navigate 4 times (scene 0 -> 1 -> 2 -> 3 -> 4) Expected: 4 But was: 0
